sentence: El cielo no está claro hoy.
ipa: ˈel ˈθjelo ˈno eˈsta ˈklaɾo ˈoi
gloss_en: The sky is not clear today.
notes: Distinción ⟨ci⟩ [θ] 'cielo' and tonic Ĕ>ie diphthong [ˈθjelo] per hualde2005; ⟨e⟩+⟨e⟩ elision across 'no está' per penny2002.

sentence: Estos zapatos cuestan cuarenta euros.
ipa: ˈestos θaˈpatos ˈkwestan kwaˈɾenta ˈewɾos
gloss_en: These shoes cost forty euros.
notes: ⟨z⟩ [θ] 'zapatos' (distinción) and Ŏ>ue 'cuestan' [ˈkwestan] per hualde2005; sandhi ⟨s⟩+voiced onset in 'estos zapatos' per penny2002.

sentence: La reunión es mañana a las tres.
ipa: ˈla reˈwnion ˈes maˈɲana ˈa ˈlas ˈtɾes
gloss_en: The meeting is tomorrow at three.
notes: Palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] 'mañana' per harris1969; word-initial trill [r] 'reunión' per hualde2005.

sentence: Mi hermano vive cerca de la plaza.
ipa: ˈmi eˈɾmano ˈbibe ˈθeɾka ˈde ˈla ˈplaθa
gloss_en: My brother lives near the square.
notes: Distinción ⟨ce⟩ [θ] 'cerca' and ⟨za⟩ [θ] 'plaza' per hualde2005; intervocalic ⟨v/b⟩ approximant [β] 'vive' per harris1969.

sentence: Ve de frente y tuerce en la primera calle.
ipa: ˈbe ˈde ˈfɾente ˈi ˈtweɾθe ˈen ˈla pɾiˈmeɾa ˈkaʝe
gloss_en: Go straight ahead and turn at the first street.
notes: Ŏ>ue 'tuerce' with ⟨c⟩ [θ] [ˈtweɾθe] per hualde2005; yeísmo ⟨ll⟩ [ʝ] 'calle' per penny2002.

sentence: La paella de aquel sitio estaba deliciosa.
ipa: ˈla ˈpaeʝa ˈde aˈkel ˈsitjo eˈstaβa deliˈθjosa
gloss_en: The paella at that place was delicious.
notes: Yeísmo ⟨ll⟩ [ʝ] 'paella' and ⟨ci⟩ [θ] 'deliciosa' per hualde2005; vowel elision 'de aquel' per penny2002.

sentence: Dónde está la llave del coche?
ipa: ˈdonde eˈsta ˈla ˈʝabe ˈdel ˈkotʃe
gloss_en: Where is the car key?
notes: Yeísmo ⟨ll⟩ [ʝ] 'llave' per hualde2005; ⟨ch⟩ affricate [tʃ] 'coche' per harris1969.

sentence: Cuántas personas vienen a cenar?
ipa: ˈkuantas peˈɾsonas ˈbjenen ˈa θeˈnaɾ
gloss_en: How many people are coming to dinner?
notes: Ĕ>ie 'vienen' [ˈbjenen] and distinción ⟨ce⟩ [θ] 'cenar' per hualde2005; vowel hiatus 'a cenar' per penny2002.

sentence: Si yo pudiera, compraría aquella casa.
ipa: ˈsi ˈʝo puˈðjeɾa kompɾaˈɾia aˈkeʝa ˈkasa
gloss_en: If I could, I would buy that house.
notes: Yeísmo ⟨y⟩ [ʝ] 'yo' and ⟨ll⟩ [ʝ] 'aquella' per hualde2005; conditional 'compraría' per penny2002.

sentence: Ayer compré cinco kilos de cerezas en la plaza.
ipa: aˈʝeɾ koˈmpɾe ˈθinko ˈkilos ˈde θeˈɾeθas ˈen ˈla ˈplaθa
gloss_en: Yesterday I bought five kilos of cherries in the square.
notes: Yeísmo ⟨y⟩ [ʝ] 'ayer' and distinción ⟨c/z⟩ [θ] 'cinco','cerezas','plaza' per hualde2005; count phrase per penny2002.

sentence: El año que viene viajaré a Sevilla.
ipa: ˈel ˈaɲo ˈke ˈbjene bjaxaˈɾe ˈa seˈbiʝa
gloss_en: Next year I will travel to Seville.
notes: Palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] 'año' and yeísmo ⟨ll⟩ [ʝ] 'Sevilla' per hualde2005; ⟨j⟩ velar [x] 'viajaré' per harris1969.

sentence: Llámame cuando llegues a casa.
ipa: ˈʝamame ˈkwando ˈʝeɡes ˈa ˈkasa
gloss_en: Call me when you get home.
notes: Yeísmo word-initial ⟨ll⟩ [ʝ] 'llámame','llegues' per hualde2005; ⟨gu⟩ [ɡ] before front vowel 'llegues' per harris1969.

sentence: Buenas tardes, cómo le va la vida?
ipa: ˈbwenas ˈtaɾdes ˈkomo ˈle ˈba ˈla ˈbiða
gloss_en: Good afternoon, how is life treating you?
notes: Ŏ>ue 'buenas' [ˈbwenas] per hualde2005; intervocalic ⟨d⟩ approximant [ð] 'vida' per harris1969.

sentence: Más vale pájaro en mano que ciento volando.
ipa: ˈmas ˈbale ˈpaxaɾo ˈen ˈmano ˈke ˈθjento boˈlando
gloss_en: A bird in the hand is worth two in the bush.
notes: Distinción ⟨ci⟩ [θ] with Ĕ>ie 'ciento' [ˈθjento] per hualde2005; proverbial register per penny2002.

sentence: El perro corre por la orilla del río.
ipa: ˈel ˈpero ˈkore ˈpoɾ ˈla oˈɾiʝa ˈdel ˈrio
gloss_en: The dog runs along the bank of the river.
notes: Trill/tap contrast ⟨rr⟩ [r] 'perro','corre' vs ⟨r⟩ [ɾ] 'orilla', with word-initial [r] 'río' per hualde2005; yeísmo ⟨ll⟩ [ʝ] 'orilla' per harris1969.

sentence: El niño pequeño sueña con la montaña.
ipa: ˈel ˈniɲo peˈkeɲo ˈsweɲa ˈkon ˈla moˈntaɲa
gloss_en: The small child dreams about the mountain.
notes: Palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] 'niño','pequeño','montaña' per harris1969; Ŏ>ue 'sueña' [ˈsweɲa] per hualde2005.

sentence: La plaza de la catedral tiene doce columnas.
ipa: ˈla ˈplaθa ˈde ˈla kateˈdɾal ˈtjene ˈdoθe koˈlumnas
gloss_en: The cathedral square has twelve columns.
notes: Distinción ⟨za⟩/⟨ce⟩ [θ] 'plaza','doce' per hualde2005; Ĕ>ie 'tiene' [ˈtjene] per penny2002.

sentence: Aquella villa amarilla brilla bajo la lluvia.
ipa: aˈkeʝa ˈbiʝa amaˈɾiʝa ˈbɾiʝa ˈbaxo ˈla ˈʝubja
gloss_en: That yellow villa shines in the rain.
notes: Yeísmo ⟨ll⟩ [ʝ] throughout 'aquella','villa','amarilla','brilla','lluvia' (no lateral [ʎ]) per hualde2005; vowel hiatus 'villa amarilla' per penny2002.

sentence: Bueno, el pueblo entero quiere una fiesta nueva.
ipa: ˈbweno ˈel ˈpweblo eˈnteɾo ˈkjeɾe ˈuna ˈfjesta ˈnweba
gloss_en: Well, the whole town wants a new party.
notes: Multiple diphthongs Ŏ>ue 'bueno','pueblo','nueva' and Ĕ>ie 'quiere','fiesta' per hualde2005; ⟨o⟩+⟨e⟩ elision 'pueblo entero' per penny2002.

sentence: No creo que llueva sobre aquellos cerros.
ipa: ˈno ˈkɾeo ˈke ˈʝweba ˈsobɾe aˈkeʝos ˈθeros
gloss_en: I do not think it will rain over those hills.
notes: Yeísmo ⟨ll⟩ [ʝ] with Ŏ>ue 'llueva' [ˈʝweba], distinción ⟨ce⟩ [θ] and trill ⟨rr⟩ [r] 'cerros' per hualde2005; negation frame per harris1969.
